Home / Services / Storm Door Installation

Storm Door Installation

Protect your entry door from the elements with a durable, stylish storm door.

Minneapolis weather can be unpredictable, and a storm door is an essential addition to protect your entry door from rain, snow, and wind. Premier Window Pros offers professional storm door installation services, ensuring your entry door stays protected and your home remains comfortable. We offer a variety of storm door styles, including full-view, half-view, and retractable screen options, allowing you to customize the look and functionality of your door.

Our experienced installers ensure a proper fit and secure installation, preventing drafts and water damage. We also offer a range of hardware options, including handles, locks, and closers, to enhance the security and convenience of your storm door. Invest in a quality storm door and protect your entry door from the elements for years to come. Extend the life of your entry door and improve your home's energy efficiency with our expert storm door installation services.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Storm Door Selection & Consultation
  2. 02 Step 2: Precise Measurements & Customization
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional Storm Door Installation
  4. 04 Step 4: Hardware Installation & Weatherproofing

Benefits

  • Protection from the Elements
  • Improved Energy Efficiency
  • Extended Life of Entry Door
  • Added Security

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the difference between a full-view and half-view storm door?

A full-view storm door has a large glass panel that provides unobstructed views, while a half-view storm door has a smaller glass panel and a solid panel at the bottom for added durability.

Can you install a storm door on any type of entry door?

We can install storm doors on most types of entry doors, including wood, steel, and fiberglass.

How long does storm door installation take?

Storm door installation typically takes a few hours, depending on the complexity of the project.

Get a Free Estimate
